Research

Active research projects. Updated as work progresses.

CERIAS Binary Hardening Research

Active ‚ÄĒ Primary Research

Caterpillar-funded research through Purdue CERIAS on compiler-level binary hardening for ARM Cortex-M3 embedded systems running Zephyr RTOS.

Embedded SecurityARM Cortex-M3GCC

LLM Political Bias Research

Active ‚ÄĒ Secondary Research

Mechanistic interpretability research with Purdue College of Liberal Arts using sparse autoencoders on Gemma-2-2B to identify political bias structures.

Machine LearningMechanistic InterpretabilitySparse Autoencoders

Data Mine Anomaly Detection

Active ‚ÄĒ Secondary Research

ML anomaly detection research through the Purdue Data Mine learning community, applying machine learning methods for identifying anomalous patterns in datasets.

Machine LearningAnomaly DetectionData Science
